key_metrics.top_engagement_venue: Palm Tree Beach Club (6.3% IG engagement)
key_metrics.liv_positioning: LIV Nightclub: 3.2% IG engagement (rank 5/10), 88K followers (rank 9/10) - holding position
key_metrics.liv_beach_positioning: LIV Beach: 4.1% IG engagement (rank 2/10 for engagement), 40K followers (rank 10/10) - strong performer

market_structure: Tier 1: OMNIA (463K), XS (309K), Encore (283K) - Mass market mega-venues
Tier 2: Hakkasan (255K), Zouk (248K), OMNIA Dayclub (246K) - Diversified experience
Tier 3: Palm Tree (233K), Tao Beach (93K), LIV Nightclub (88K) - Niche/Emerging
LIV Beach (40K) - Younger audience, high engagement ratio
engagement_leaders: Palm Tree Beach Club: 6.3% IG engagement (premium luxury positioning)
OMNIA Dayclub: 5.2% IG engagement (brand new, high hype)
LIV Beach: 4.1% IG engagement (best ratio: followers vs engagement)
Tao Beach: 4.8% IG engagement (established dayclub consistency)

threat_analysis.immediate: OMNIA Dayclub (opens May 15, 246K followers, 5.2% engagement) - Direct competition for premium dayclub audience
threat_analysis.emerging: Palm Tree (233K followers, 6.3% engagement, luxury Kygo positioning) - Capturing highest-spend demographic
threat_analysis.traditional_strong: XS continues dominance (309K followers, 3557 reviews, 4.1★) with consistent content strategy

market_dynamics.posting_cadence: High performers posting 5.5-6.5x/week (XS, Hakkasan, Encore) vs LIV 4.5x/week
market_dynamics.content_mix_winners: Behind-scenes artist content, real-time event energy videos (carousel posts outperform single-image 2:1)
market_dynamics.platform_strategy: Instagram leads for nightclubs (3.0-3.5% ER), TikTok for dayclubs (4.8-6.3% ER)
market_dynamics.hashtag_opportunity: LIV using #livnightclub (35K/month, up trend) but missing competitive tags like #omnianightclub (85K/month)
market_dynamics.review_sentiment: OMNIA faces service complaints (3.9★ despite 463K followers); XS leads in positive sentiment (4.1★, 3557 reviews)
market_dynamics.edc_week_impact: Expect 2-3x engagement spike May 14-17; pre-announce events now for April 10+ lead time

liv_actionable_insights.strength: LIV Beach engagement rate (4.1%) punches above follower weight; intimate LIV Nightclub positioning differentiates vs mega-clubs
liv_actionable_insights.weakness: Posting frequency lag (4.5/week vs market avg 6.5/week); limited TikTok presence (nightclub)
opportunity: EDC Week surge: Pre-announce 5-7 day out (May 9-10 ideal timing for May 14-17 events)
Content format: Increase carousel posts (artist backstage, real-time crowd energy) and short-form TikTok
Cross-promotion: Daytime LIV Beach (4.1% ER) → Nighttime LIV Club (3.2% ER) bundled experiences
defensive: Monitor OMNIA Dayclub launch impact (May 15); prepare counter-programming for premium audience
Increase posting frequency to 6-7x/week to match market expectations
Address staff sentiment in reviews (separate from OMNIA's 3.9★ but still noted in feedback)

LIV_Nightclub.recommendation: Increase posting frequency; prepare EDC Week campaign

LIV_Beach.recommendation: Maintain content; cross-promote nightclub; EDC Week spike expected

OMNIA_Nightclub.threat: Market dominant but service sentiment fragile (3.9★); Dayclub launch splits audience

2026-W20.coverage: Complete - Comprehensive snapshot with 40 web searches across 10 venues, social metrics extraction, review analysis, event discovery, hashtag tracking, and competitive analysis
